programme.title: Halftime Report - Part 1
programme.desc: CNBC's host Scott Wapner, along with Wall Street's top investors, get to the heart of the action as it's happening.

programme.title: Halftime Report - Part 2
programme.desc: CNBC's host Scott Wapner, along with Wall Street's top investors, get to the heart of the action as it's happening.

programme.title: The Exchange - Part 1
programme.desc: Anchor Kelly Evans reports on the most important stories to the day's markets and investors. Reporters provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.desc: Anchor Kelly Evans reports on the most important stories to the day's markets and investors. Reporters provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon /#60 : Ep 1490 : Don Cheadle / Cecily Strong / Musical Guest
programme.desc: The long-running late-night talk show returns to New York for the first time since 1972 when comic Jimmy Fallon takes over hosting duties, accompanied by his Grammy-winning house band, The Roots. The former cast member of "Saturday Night Live" and lead of a later show welcomes guests to an evening of comedy, music, conversation and competitions. Lorne Michaels serves as the programme's executive producer.

programme.title: Nbc Nightly News
programme.desc: NBC Nightly News with Lester Holt provides reports and analysis of the day's national and international events.

programme.desc: Business news preceding the opening of the markets in Asia, anchored by Martin Soon, Karen So, and Bernie Lo.

programme.title: Capital Connection - 2nd Hour
programme.desc: Global viewers learn impact of market movements across European, Asian and Middle Eastern borders; the series bridge between the close of the Asian markets and the beginning of the European trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money - Part 1
programme.desc: Traders give you the information normally reserved for the Wall Street trading floor.

programme.title: Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon /#60 : Ep 1491 : Mark Wahlberg / Mark Hamill / Musical Guest
programme.desc: The long-running late-night talk show returns to New York for the first time since 1972 when comic Jimmy Fallon takes over hosting duties, accompanied by his Grammy-winning house band, The Roots. The former cast member of "Saturday Night Live" and lead of a later show welcomes guests to an evening of comedy, music, conversation and competitions. Lorne Michaels serves as the programme's executive producer.

programme.title: Nbc Nightly News
programme.desc: NBC Nightly News with Lester Holt provides reports and analysis of the day's national and international events.

programme.title: The News With Shepard Smith
programme.desc: "The News With Shepard Smith" is CNBC's nightly newscast providing deep, non-partisan coverage and perspective on the day's most important stories.

programme.title: Cnbc Meets #30
programme.desc: Tania Bryer travels to Monaco to meet HSH Prince Albert II and discover what drives his passionate mission to preserve the World's Oceans. His Serene Highness discusses his childhood, his parents and his hopes for future generations.

programme.title: The Leadership League
programme.desc: Celebrated tennis coach, Patrick Mouratoglou speaks to CNBC's Tania Bryer about working with legendary player, Serena Williams, COVID-19's impact on the sport and the Black Lives Matter movement.

programme.title: Closing Bell (repeat)
programme.desc: Guiding you through US day trading.

programme.title: The News With Shepard Smith (repeat)
programme.desc: "The News With Shepard Smith" is CNBC's nightly newscast providing deep, non-partisan coverage and perspective on the day's most important stories.

programme.title: Cnbc Conversation
programme.desc: Co-founded one of the largest private equity firms in the world, James Coulter talks about the US-China trade spat and its impact on global investments.

programme.title: Managing Asia
programme.desc: A look at what it takes to transform a business to become greener and ensure a more sustainable future. Christine Tan talks to CEOs from four companies in the region, YTL PowerSeraya, TAL Apparel, Banpu Public Company and Alliance Global.

programme.title: Cnbc Meets #30
programme.desc: Tania Bryer travels to Monaco to meet HSH Prince Albert II and discover what drives his passionate mission to preserve the World's Oceans. His Serene Highness discusses his childhood, his parents and his hopes for future generations.

programme.title: The Leadership League
programme.desc: Celebrated tennis coach, Patrick Mouratoglou speaks to CNBC's Tania Bryer about working with legendary player, Serena Williams, COVID-19's impact on the sport and the Black Lives Matter movement.

programme.title: The News With Shepard Smith (repeat)
programme.desc: "The News With Shepard Smith" is CNBC's nightly newscast providing deep, non-partisan coverage and perspective on the day's most important stories.

programme.title: Answers With Bayless Conley (f)
programme.desc: Bayless Conley shares his interpretation of the Bible with some devotional answers for audience members.

programme.title: The Leadership League
programme.desc: Celebrated tennis coach, Patrick Mouratoglou speaks to CNBC's Tania Bryer about working with legendary player, Serena Williams, COVID-19's impact on the sport and the Black Lives Matter movement.

programme.title: Cnbc Conversation
programme.desc: Co-founded one of the largest private equity firms in the world, James Coulter talks about the US-China trade spat and its impact on global investments.

programme.title: Managing Asia
programme.desc: A look at what it takes to transform a business to become greener and ensure a more sustainable future. Christine Tan talks to CEOs from four companies in the region, YTL PowerSeraya, TAL Apparel, Banpu Public Company and Alliance Global.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A femme fatale with a way of getting men to do what she wants sets a trap for a multi-millionaire divorcee.

programme.title: Cnbc Sports: Us Pga (8 Parts) /#2 Hrs : Pga Tour
Spirit Of Yachting
programme.desc: Journey to the sailing world's most famous grand prix race tracks where action becomes fast and exciting and locations are spectacular.

programme.title: Mobil 1 The Grid
programme.desc: This feature-led programme covers the world's greatest motorsport championships from F1, NASCAR and IndyCar to World Rally, DTM and the Porsche Super Cup.

programme.title: Reaction Sports
programme.desc: Bringing the best in entertainment and news programming.

programme.title: Cnbc Meets #30
programme.desc: Tania Bryer travels to Monaco to meet HSH Prince Albert II and discover what drives his passionate mission to preserve the World's Oceans. His Serene Highness discusses his childhood, his parents and his hopes for future generations.

programme.title: Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon /#60 : Ep 1478 : Kathryn Hahn / Jon M. Chu / Musical Guest

Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon /#60 : Ep 1489 : Bts / ?dgar Ram?rez / Musical Guest
Secret Lives Of The Super Rich
programme.desc: One of the most-exclusive stretches of sand in the world, Rihanna's Los Angeles mansion, a mega-mansion for a horse, and a super jet with a super secret owner.

programme.title: Nbc Nightly News
programme.desc: NBC Nightly News with Lester Holt provides reports and analysis of the day's national and international events.

programme.title: Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon /#60 : Ep 1478 : Kathryn Hahn / Jon M. Chu / Musical Guest
programme.desc: Jimmy Fallon's guests include actress Kathryn Hahn and director Jon M. Chu, while Polo G performs.

programme.title: Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon /#60 : Ep 1488 : Tom Hiddleston / Tig Notaro / Musical Guest
programme.desc: Actor Dwayne Johnson; actor Tom Hiddleston; comic Tig Notaro; GoldLink and Flo Milli perform.

programme.title: Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon /#60 : Ep 1489 : Bts / ?dgar Ram?rez / Musical Guest
programme.desc: From the heart of New York City, Jimmy Fallon is with K-Pop superstars BTS for the start of their two-day takeover. Plus, Edgar Ramirez joins the show.

programme.title: Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon /#60 : Ep 1490 : Don Cheadle / Cecily Strong / Musical Guest
programme.desc: From the heart of New York City, Jimmy Fallon is joined by Don Cheadle, Cecily Strong and musical guest BTS.

programme.title: Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon /#60 : Ep 1491 : Mark Wahlberg / Mark Hamill / Musical Guest
programme.desc: Jimmy Fallon hosts A-list guests along with a topical monologue, fan-favourite games, signature comedy segments, and popular music from Grammy-winning house band, The Roots.

programme.title: Cnbc Meets #30
programme.desc: Tania Bryer travels to Monaco to meet HSH Prince Albert II and discover what drives his passionate mission to preserve the World's Oceans. His Serene Highness discusses his childhood, his parents and his hopes for future generations.

programme.desc: Celebrated tennis coach, Patrick Mouratoglou speaks to CNBC's Tania Bryer about working with legendary player, Serena Williams, COVID-19's impact on the sport and the Black Lives Matter movement.

programme.title: Cnbc Conversation
programme.desc: Co-founded one of the largest private equity firms in the world, James Coulter talks about the US-China trade spat and its impact on global investments.

programme.title: Managing Asia
programme.desc: A look at what it takes to transform a business to become greener and ensure a more sustainable future. Christine Tan talks to CEOs from four companies in the region, YTL PowerSeraya, TAL Apparel, Banpu Public Company and Alliance Global.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Messages from author and evangelist Joel Osteen as he spreads his message of love and hope. The pastor urges people to live to their full potential and form a close relationship with God.

programme.title: Answers With Bayless Conley (f)
programme.desc: Bayless Conley shares his interpretation of the Bible with some devotional answers for audience members.

programme.title: In Touch Ministries
programme.desc: International Bible ministry representing the Gospel of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: New Creation Church With Joseph Prince
programme.desc: Pastor Prince delivers vibrant messages and lessons effectively, using his unique sense of humour and his sensible approach to preaching.

programme.title: Elevation Church With Pastor Steven Furtick
programme.desc: Learn more about beliefs, values, and leadership that help support the mission of Elevation Church.

programme.title: Secret Lives Of The Super Rich
programme.desc: One of the most-exclusive stretches of sand in the world, Rihanna's Los Angeles mansion, a mega-mansion for a horse, and a super jet with a super secret owner.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A middle-aged real estate investor finds love and steals client money to impress his new bride.

programme.title: Cnbc Sports: Us Pga (8 Parts) /#2 Hrs : Pga Tour
Andalucia Rally
programme.desc: Coverage of the Andalucia Rally, organised to help drivers prepare for the Dakar Rally.

programme.desc: Co-founded one of the largest private equity firms in the world, James Coulter talks about the US-China trade spat and its impact on global investments.

programme.title: Managing Asia
programme.desc: A look at what it takes to transform a business to become greener and ensure a more sustainable future. Christine Tan talks to CEOs from four companies in the region, YTL PowerSeraya, TAL Apparel, Banpu Public Company and Alliance Global.

programme.title: Meet The Press
programme.desc: Acclaimed by conservatives and liberals, newsmakers and television critics, Meet the Press consistently makes Monday morning headlines with its high-profile guests.

programme.title: Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon /#60 : Ep 1495 : Kate Beckinsale / Fred Armisen / Musical Guest
The Leadership League
programme.desc: Celebrated tennis coach, Patrick Mouratoglou speaks to CNBC's Tania Bryer about working with legendary player, Serena Williams, COVID-19's impact on the sport and the Black Lives Matter movement.

programme.title: Marketing Media Money
programme.desc: Featuring profiles of chief marketing officers at some of the world's biggest brands, taking a look at their careers and business challenges, in addition to how they are spending their significant advertising budgets.

programme.title: Inside E-commerce
programme.desc: What makes the perfect ecosystem for online retail to thrive? This CNBC special uses Singapore as a case study to discuss the future of E-Commerce; from packaging to payments to last mile and logistics. This is CNBC's Inside E-Commerce.

programme.title: Cnbc Meets #30
programme.desc: He's a world-renowned cellist with a six decade career. Tania Bryer meets Yo-Yo Ma to discover how he hopes music will help break down barriers and create cross-cultural understanding.

programme.title: The Leadership League
programme.desc: Celebrated tennis coach, Patrick Mouratoglou speaks to CNBC's Tania Bryer about working with legendary player, Serena Williams, COVID-19's impact on the sport and the Black Lives Matter movement.

programme.desc: Featuring profiles of chief marketing officers at some of the world's biggest brands, taking a look at their careers and business challenges, in addition to how they are spending their significant advertising budgets.

programme.title: Inside E-commerce
programme.desc: What makes the perfect ecosystem for online retail to thrive? This CNBC special uses Singapore as a case study to discuss the future of E-Commerce; from packaging to payments to last mile and logistics. This is CNBC's Inside E-Commerce.

programme.desc: He's a world-renowned cellist with a six decade career. Tania Bryer meets Yo-Yo Ma to discover how he hopes music will help break down barriers and create cross-cultural understanding.

programme.title: The Leadership League
programme.desc: Celebrated tennis coach, Patrick Mouratoglou speaks to CNBC's Tania Bryer about working with legendary player, Serena Williams, COVID-19's impact on the sport and the Black Lives Matter movement.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Police Lt. Joe Gliniewicz steals from a youth group and his death in the woods in Fox Lake, Ill., sparks a massive manhunt to find his killers.

programme.desc: Featuring profiles of chief marketing officers at some of the world's biggest brands, taking a look at their careers and business challenges, in addition to how they are spending their significant advertising budgets.

Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon /#60 : Ep 1493 : Jonas Brothers / Zoe Lister-jones / Musical Guest
Secret Lives Of The Super Rich
programme.desc: A look inside the homes of the rich and famous.

programme.title: Secret Lives Of The Super Rich
programme.desc: Helicopter empress Lynn Tilton is blonde, beautiful and a self-made billionaire. Also, the super rich aren't just reaching new heights; they're reaching new depths with super jets that fly under water.

programme.title: Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon /#60 : Ep 1484 : Vin Diesel / Riley Keough / Musical Guest
programme.desc: Actor Vin Diesel; actress Riley Keough; Modest Mouse performs.

programme.title: Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon /#60 : Ep 1492 : Dwayne Johnson / Joshua Jackson / Musical Guest
Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon /#60 : Ep 1493 : Jonas Brothers / Zoe Lister-jones / Musical Guest
Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon /#60 : Ep 1494 : Emilia Clarke / Mark Ronson / Musical Guest
programme.desc: The long-running late-night talk show returns to New York for the first time since 1972 when comic Jimmy Fallon takes over hosting duties, accompanied by his Grammy-winning house band, The Roots. The former cast member of "Saturday Night Live" and lead of a later show welcomes guests to an evening of comedy, music, conversation and competitions. Lorne Michaels serves as the programme's executive producer.

programme.title: Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon /#60 : Ep 1495 : Kate Beckinsale / Fred Armisen / Musical Guest
Cnbc Meets #30
programme.desc: He's a world-renowned cellist with a six decade career. Tania Bryer meets Yo-Yo Ma to discover how he hopes music will help break down barriers and create cross-cultural understanding.

programme.title: Marketing Media Money
programme.desc: Featuring profiles of chief marketing officers at some of the world's biggest brands, taking a look at their careers and business challenges, in addition to how they are spending their significant advertising budgets.

programme.title: Inside E-commerce
programme.desc: What makes the perfect ecosystem for online retail to thrive? This CNBC special uses Singapore as a case study to discuss the future of E-Commerce; from packaging to payments to last mile and logistics. This is CNBC's Inside E-Commerce.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Messages from author and evangelist Joel Osteen as he spreads his message of love and hope. The pastor urges people to live to their full potential and form a close relationship with God.

programme.title: Answers With Bayless Conley (f)
programme.desc: Bayless Conley shares his interpretation of the Bible with some devotional answers for audience members.

programme.title: In Touch Ministries
programme.desc: International Bible ministry representing the Gospel of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: New Creation Church With Joseph Prince
programme.desc: Pastor Prince delivers vibrant messages and lessons effectively, using his unique sense of humour and his sensible approach to preaching.

programme.title: Elevation Church With Pastor Steven Furtick
programme.desc: Learn more about beliefs, values, and leadership that help support the mission of Elevation Church.

programme.title: Secret Lives Of The Super Rich
programme.desc: A look inside the homes of the rich and famous.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: The stories behind some of the biggest corporate and white collar crimes in the United States.

programme.title: Meet The Press
programme.desc: Acclaimed by conservatives and liberals, newsmakers and television critics, Meet the Press consistently makes Monday morning headlines with its high-profile guests.
